title: premna oblongifolia var. subglabra
intro: Premna oblongifolia var. subglabra is a variety of the Premna oblongifolia plant, also known as the narrow-leaved Premna, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Premna oblongifolia var. subglabra include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties, which are derived from the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating fever, inflammation, and skin infections, as well as its potential in managing conditions such as malaria and typhoid fever. Premna oblongifolia var. subglabra is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
